title: Indulgent British Cheddar Grill
description: A rich, umami Cornish dish featuring a mature British cheddar cheese grilled to perfection on a yakimono-grill. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to medium-high heat.
Season the cornish fillet steaks with salt and black pepper on both sides.
Mix the garlic butter with chopped parsley, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt.
Coat the cornish fillet steaks evenly with the garlic butter mixture, making sure to get some on both sides.
Dust the cornish fillet steaks with flour, shaking off any excess.
Grill the cornish fillet steaks for 4 minutes on the first side, or until they develop a nice brown crust.
Flip the cornish fillet steaks and grill for another 3-4 minutes, or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the grilled cornish fillet steaks to a plate and let them rest for 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the chopped fresh thyme with a pinch of salt and a pinch of paprika.
Sprinkle the thyme mixture evenly over the grilled cornish fillet steaks.
Slice the mature cheddar cheese into thick slices.
Place a slice of mature cheddar cheese on top of each grilled cornish fillet steak.
Return the yakimono-grill to medium heat and grill the mature cheddar cheese for 1-2 minutes on each side, or until it's melted and golden brown.
Serve the indulgent British cheddar grills hot, garnished with additional chopped fresh parsley if desired.
